title: Case No. 33/2025 - XYZ
text:
COMPETITION COMMISSION OF INDIA
12.02.2026
Case No. 33/2025
The Commission has formed a prima facie opinion with regard to contravention of provisions
of Competition Act, 2002 in Case No. 33 of 2025 and directed the Director General to cause
investigation to be made into the matter.
*******
Case No. 33 of 2025
